email:
Hi there,

I'm really frustrated with the service I've been receiving from your company. I've called support five times now and haven't been able to get a resolution to my issue. To make matters worse, my payment was delayed by 18 days, and I haven't heard from anyone in the last 17 days. This is completely unacceptable, and I expect a prompt response and a resolution to my problem. I'm a long-time customer, and I'm not happy with the way I've been treated.

Regards,
[Customer's Name]

Hi there,

I'm really starting to get frustrated with the lack of support I'm receiving. I've called your customer service line 10 times now, and every time I'm either put on hold for ages or transferred to someone who can't seem to help me. I understand that you're probably busy, but at this point, I'm feeling completely ignored and my issue is still not resolved. I'd really appreciate it if someone could take a closer look and provide me with a solution soon.

Thanks,
[Customer Name]

Here is a short realistic email from a frustrated customer:

I'm at my wit's end here. I've called your support line six times now over the past two weeks, and no one has been able to resolve the issue with my delayed payment. It's been 18 days since I submitted my payment, and I'm still waiting for it to clear. This is unacceptable. I need this resolved immediately, as I'm facing late fees from other vendors due to your company's incompetence. Please escalate this to a supervisor who can actually fix the problem. I'm quickly losing patience.

Here is a short, realistic email from a frustrated customer:

I'm at my wit's end here. I've called your support line 7 times over the past 29 days and no one has gotten back to me. I paid for your service and I expect to receive the help I need. This is completely unacceptable. I demand a response within the next 2 business days or I will be forced to take my business elsewhere.

Hi there,

I'm really frustrated with the lack of response from your support team. I've called five times over the past 20 days and haven't heard back from anyone. This is a critical issue for my business, and I need a resolution as soon as possible. Can someone from your team please contact me directly to address this problem? I'm at the end of my rope here and need your help.

Sincerely,
[Customer Name]
